research_object: US major indices and AI/semiconductor-led selloff
readiness_basis: Official macro data and professional market reports support a clear explanation of the selloff, but direct exchange quote feed, credit/liquidity data, options positioning, and portfolio context were not retained.
blocking_gaps: No direct exchange or index provider snapshot retained for all quotes.
No credit-spread, funding-market, or options-positioning data.
No user holdings, weights, mandate, or risk budget, so actionability is waived.
handoffs: position_review if user asks what to do with holdings
portfolio_construction_review if user provides exposures and risk budget
monitoring_update after Monday premarket or next major Fed/rate signal
source_scope: BLS official labor release plus AP, Reuters-syndicated, and Axios market coverage for 2026-06-05 session-close selloff.
must_refresh_if: Nasdaq futures or QQQ moves another +/-2% before Monday cash open.
10-year Treasury yield moves above the post-jobs-report high or reverses sharply lower.
PHLX Semiconductor Index or SMH fails to rebound while broader market stabilizes.
New Fed communication changes the rate-path interpretation.
Fresh credit or liquidity indicators show stress beyond equities.
notes: This package explains the selloff and sets refresh conditions. It is not an investment recommendation and does not include position sizing or trade execution.
